title: Fun Time Charlie The Caterpillar Activity Toy, multicoloured
features: Suitable for age 12 months and upwards
description: Product Description This multicoloured Charlie the Caterpillar activity toy from Fun Time makes an ideal choice for your young toddler. It’s educatiol, sturdy and the fun and games never stop. Take the friendly Caterpillar for a walk by pulling him along. Watch the brightly coloured balls spin as the caterpillar moves. We can’t promise that the Fun Time range of toys will make your child a genius, but they will certainly stimulate their senses and help to develop their skills. There’s only one word for Charlie the Caterpillar and that word is “FUN”. This product conforms to EN71 and the Toy Safety Directive. Please remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 12 months and upwards. Box Contains Funtime; Fun Time; Charlie the Caterpillar; Caterpillar; Activity; Pull Along; Pull; 12 months+
